extraction.one_line_summary: ULISSI Diego infiltrated the reduced GC group sprint after Sagan/Swift were distanced on Muro di Calaone, beating Almeida by half a wheel.
tactical_patterns: Bora isolated Sagan with Ballerini sitting on chase, forcing Sagan to work alone despite 15-second deficit.
Deceuninck Quick-Step paced climbs hard enough to drop Démare/sprinters while keeping GC contenders fresh for sprint.
Ulissi positioned among GC riders rather than sprinters' group, exploiting confusion when pure sprinters eliminated.
Gaviria/Hodeg accelerated at summit Muro di Calaone but Quick-Step domestiques Masnada/Knox controlled descent tempo.

rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: negative: distanced on Muro di Calaone despite team setup, couldn't bridge 15-second gap even with Swift
rider_signals.DÉMARE Arnaud: negative: dropped multiple bike lengths on gentler Roccolo climb, barely regrouped before steeper Muro
rider_signals.BALLERINI Davide: negative: sat on Sagan's chase wheel instead of contributing, revealing Quick-Step prioritized GC over breakaway chance
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: positive: second place finish gained 6 bonus seconds, sprinted competitively against puncheurs on selective uphill finish
rider_signals.ULISSI Diego: positive: positioned perfectly among GC group despite being climber-sprinter, exploited tactical confusion for stage win number two
rider_signals.VIVIANI Elia: negative: struggled alongside Démare on both climbs, unable to contest finish despite regaining contact
